## Self-Check / 自检清单

- [ ] Video ≤ 3 min, ≥ 1080p / 视频 ≤ 3 分钟，≥ 1080p
- [ ] README bilingual (EN+CN) / README 中英双语
- [ ] ≥ 5 key screenshots / 至少 5 张关键操作截图
- [ ] All prompt files included / 所有 prompt 文件齐全
- [ ] Configs sanitized (no IP/keys/paths) / 配置文件已脱敏
- [ ] SerialRUN v0.4.3+ repo link correct / 引用 SerialRUN v0.4.3+ 正确仓库
- [ ] End-to-end MCP loop demonstrated / 演示了一个完整的 MCP 调试闭环

## Related Task / 关联任务

- [ ] AGI Builder task link / AGI Builder 任务链接: ____
